title: Cobblemon Dailies
description: Daily quests for the Cobblemon mod! Comes with configuration options including quest rewards, daily reset toggle and time, and HUD toggling!
body:
# Cobblemon Dailies

**Add engaging daily quests to your Cobblemon server!**

Cobblemon Dailies adds on top of the popular Cobblemon minecraft mod to add a daily activity for players on multiplayer servers.

## Features

**Four Quest Types**: Catch Pokémon, gain experience, win PvP battles, and trade with players **Daily Reset System**: Timezone-aware daily quest resets keep players coming back

![Daily Quest UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19c8d5018cf16b197301be8882929e3e17b8f398_0.webp)

**Quest Giver NPCs**: Transform any NPC into a quest giver with simple commands  
**Configurable Rewards**: in game reward system editor for server admins to set appropriate rewards for all quest tiers.

![Quest Configuration UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84991a2f9ac785cc1c8522240ac09873236e2eb6_0.webp)

## How It Works

1.  **Server admins** designate NPCs as quest givers using `/cmquestnpc designate`.
2.  **Players** right-click quest NPCs to open the quest selection interface
3.  **Choose daily quests** from catch, experience, PvP, or trading challenges
4.  **Complete objectives** with real-time progress tracking
5.  **Claim rewards** when quests are finished, unlocking the next difficulty!

## Configuration

Easily customize:

*   Daily reset times and timezones
*   Reward items and amounts for each quest type
*   Enable/disable daily limitations
*   Quest parameters and difficulty

## Admin Commands

New & changed with V2.0.0+

*   `/cmquest edit_rewards` - Opens the reward editor
*   `/cmquest reset_player <player_name>` - resets the player's daily cooldown (primarily for testing)
*   `/cmquest full_reset_player <player_name>` - resets the player's quest data

The following commands continue to exist, but versions earlier than 2.0.0 may have a slightly different function.

*   `/cmquestnpc designate` - Make NPCs into quest givers - interacting with an already designated NPC removes them as a quest giver
*   `/cmquestnpc remove` - Removes selected NPC as a designated quest NPC
*   `/cmquestnpc list` - View all quest NPCs with coordinates
*   `/cmquestnpc clear` - Removes all designated quest NPCs
*   `/cmquest debug_*` - Debug commands for testing
*   `/cmquest reset_player <player_name>` - resets the player's quest data

## Player Experience

*   **J key** toggles quest progress HUD
*   **Automatic synchronization** across server restarts
*   **Visual feedback** for quest availability and progress
